title: Konyak compatibility profile
description: Declarative compatibility rules for a Windows program in Konyak.

x-konyak-semanticRules.description: Winetricks verbs must not be repeated within one profile.
Native DLL actions must not target the same destination and case-insensitive target file name more than once.
An executable suffix must contain at least one non-whitespace printable ASCII character.
All child-process rules together may contain at most 64 appended arguments.
The serialized child-process rule set must not exceed 65535 UTF-16 code units.

allOf.description: installerCompletion may be declared only when every target platform is macOS.

$schema.description: Canonical JSON Schema URI used to identify and validate this profile format.

schemaVersion.description: Version of the complete compatibility-profile document contract.

id.description: Stable lowercase identifier for the install profile.

name.description: Human-readable profile name shown by Konyak.

profileVersion.description: Monotonically increasing revision of this install profile.

summary.description: Short human-readable explanation of the profile's purpose.

platforms.description: Hosts the profile is intended for. childProcessRules and installerCompletion are currently effective on macOS only.

windowsVersion.description: Windows compatibility mode configured for the managed bottle.

managedProgramPath.description: Absolute Windows path of the executable Konyak manages after installation.

installerResource.description: Immutable HTTPS source for the Windows installer executed by profile installation.

kind.description: Resource transport discriminator; schema version 1 accepts HTTPS only.

url.description: HTTPS URL from which Konyak downloads the installer.

sha256.description: Expected SHA-256 digest of the downloaded installer, encoded as 64 hexadecimal characters.

fileName.description: A basename ending in .exe or .msi; path separators and control characters are forbidden.

installerCompletion.description: Optional completion behavior for an installer that leaves one known child executable running after installation has finished.

ignoreChildExecutable.description: A safe Windows .exe basename whose continued execution does not keep installer completion waiting.

preInstallActions.description: Ordered declarative actions applied before the Windows installer is launched.

oneOf.description: Runs one named winetricks verb in the managed bottle.

kind.description: Pre-install action discriminator for a winetricks verb.

verb.description: Winetricks verb passed through Konyak's managed winetricks execution path.

oneOf.description: Downloads a verified native DLL and installs it into the architecture-matched Windows system directory.
An x86 DLL must be installed into windowsSysWow64.
An x64 DLL must be installed into windowsSystem32.

kind.description: Pre-install action discriminator for a native DLL.

componentId.description: Stable identifier for the native component installed by this action.

machine.description: Machine architecture of the downloaded DLL.

destination.description: Managed Windows system directory receiving the DLL.

targetFileName.description: Safe DLL basename used at the managed destination.

resource.description: Immutable HTTPS source for the native DLL payload.

kind.description: Resource transport discriminator; schema version 1 accepts HTTPS only.

url.description: HTTPS URL from which Konyak downloads the DLL.

sha256.description: Expected SHA-256 digest of the downloaded DLL, encoded as 64 hexadecimal characters.

runCompletionPolicy.description: Whether a managed launch waits for the Windows process to exit or completes after launch.

compatibilityProfile.description: Runtime compatibility rules applied when launching the managed program.

id.description: Stable lowercase identifier for this compatibility-rule set.

profileVersion.description: Monotonically increasing revision of the compatibility-rule set.

childProcessRules.description: Rules for appending missing arguments to matching Windows child processes. Implemented by the Konyak macOS Wine runtime only in schema version 1; Linux does not yet propagate or apply these rules.

items.description: Arguments appended when a matching child executable does not already contain them.

executableSuffix.description: Printable ASCII suffix matched case-insensitively against the child executable path.

appendArgumentsIfMissing.description: Unique arguments appended to the matched child command line only when absent.
